channel.title: Daily Brief
channel.description: 每日中英双语科技与世界新闻摘要 · summarized by Gemini

item.title: 哈特福德战略收益ETF 2026年第一季度评论
item.description:
Hartford Strategic Income ETF Q1 2026 Commentary

This article provides a commentary on the Hartford Strategic Income ETF for the first quarter of 2026. It likely discusses the fund's performance, strategy, and outlook during that period.

本文对哈特福德战略收益ETF在2026年第一季度的表现进行了评论。它可能讨论了该基金在该期间的表现、策略和前景。

Tags: etf · finance · investment

item.title: [问与答] 请问下大家，想把海外银行换绑成境外运营商的号码，有哪个运营商比较合适？
item.description:
[问与答] 请问下大家，想把海外银行换绑成境外运营商的号码，有哪个运营商比较合适？

A user is asking for recommendations on an overseas mobile carrier suitable for linking to overseas bank accounts. They are currently using giffgaff, but find it expensive for calls within China and only suitable for receiving verification codes.

一位用户正在征求适合绑定海外银行账户的境外手机运营商的推荐。他们目前使用giffgaff，但发现其在中国国内通话费用昂贵，仅适合接收验证码。

Tags: mobile carrier · overseas phone number · banking

item.title: 经合组织在下调2027年增长预测的同时发出严厉警告
item.description:
OECD gives a stark warning while lowering 2027 growth forecasts

The Organisation for Economic Cooperation and Development (OECD) has issued a stark warning about the risks associated with inflation. This warning accompanies the organization's downward revision of its global economic growth forecasts for 2027.

经济合作与发展组织（OECD）就通货膨胀的风险发出了严厉警告。此警告伴随着该组织对2027年全球经济增长预测的下调。

Tags: oecd · inflation · economic forecast

item.title: 帕森斯：仍然不是一个有吸引力的机会
item.description:
Parsons: Still Not An Attractive Opportunity

This article likely analyzes the company Parsons and concludes that it does not currently present an attractive investment opportunity. It probably delves into the reasons behind this assessment, such as financial performance or market outlook.

这篇文章很可能分析了帕森斯公司，并得出结论认为目前它并非一个有吸引力的投资机会。它可能深入探讨了这一评估背后的原因，例如财务业绩或市场前景。

Tags: parsons · investment · analysis

item.title: 约翰·汉考克多经理2035终身投资组合第一季度2026
item.description:
John Hancock Multimanager 2035 Lifetime Portfolio Q1 2026

This is a financial report or commentary regarding the John Hancock Multimanager 2035 Lifetime Portfolio for the first quarter of 2026. It likely details the portfolio's performance, asset allocation, and investment strategy.

这是关于约翰·汉考克多经理2035终身投资组合在2026年第一季度的财务报告或评论。它可能详细说明了投资组合的表现、资产配置和投资策略。

Tags: portfolio · investment · finance

item.title: [Solana] coin.v2ex.pro 继续更新 · 和 V2EX 一致的配色 + 自动 Dark Mode · 成员列表 · Token Detail
item.description:
[Solana] coin.v2ex.pro 继续更新 · 和 V2EX 一致的配色 + 自动 Dark Mode · 成员列表 · Token Detail

The website coin.v2ex.pro has been updated to match V2EX's color scheme and now features an automatic dark mode. It also includes a member list and token detail functionality.

网站coin.v2ex.pro已更新，以匹配V2EX的配色方案，并新增了自动暗黑模式。它还包括了成员列表和代币详情功能。

Tags: solana · website update · dark mode

item.title: 将不受青睐的房地产转化为巨额现金流
item.description:
Turning Out-Of-Favor Real Estate Into Massive Cash Flow

This article explores strategies for generating substantial cash flow from real estate assets that are currently out of favor. It likely provides insights into identifying undervalued properties and implementing profitable management techniques.

这篇文章探讨了从当前不受青睐的房地产资产中产生可观现金流的策略。它可能提供了有关识别低估房产和实施有利可图的管理技巧的见解。

Tags: real estate · cash flow · investment

item.title: 拥有1亿家庭用户后，华尔街仍低估Roku
item.description:
100 Million Households Later And Wall Street Still Underestimates Roku

Despite reaching 100 million households, Wall Street is still underestimating the value and potential of Roku. The article likely argues for Roku's continued growth and market strength.

尽管已触及1亿家庭用户，华尔街仍低估了Roku的价值和潜力。文章可能论证了Roku的持续增长和市场实力。

Tags: roku · streaming · market analysis

item.title: [Codex] codex 最新实战，包装设计，直接客户和我微信聊天记录给他，输出效果图和 ppt，客户看到不吱声
item.description:
[Codex] codex 最新实战，包装设计，直接客户和我微信聊天记录给他，输出效果图和 ppt，客户看到不吱声

A user describes a highly efficient workflow using Codex for packaging design, where they fed client WeChat chat logs directly into the AI. The AI generated mockups and a PPT, impressing the client.

一位用户描述了使用Codex进行包装设计的极其高效的工作流程，他们将客户的微信聊天记录直接输入到AI中。AI生成了效果图和PPT，给客户留下了深刻印象。

Tags: codex · ai design · packaging design

item.title: [酷工作] [AI 创业机会] 比特鹰招聘前端开发 | 寻找像 SpaceX 一样敢想敢拼的你
item.description:
[酷工作] [AI 创业机会] 比特鹰招聘前端开发 | 寻找像 SpaceX 一样敢想敢拼的你

Biteagle is hiring front-end developers for an AI startup, seeking individuals with a SpaceX-like ambitious and pioneering spirit. The company focuses on AI data decision-making and offers competitive compensation and growth opportunities.

比特鹰正在为一家AI初创公司招聘前端开发人员，寻找具有类似SpaceX一样雄心勃勃和开拓精神的个人。该公司专注于AI数据决策领域，并提供有竞争力的薪酬和增长机会。

Tags: ai startup · frontend developer · hiring

item.title: 美国和伊朗发动新的袭击，科威特称机场遭伊朗无人机袭击
item.description:
US and Iran launch new strikes, as Kuwait says airport hit by Iranian drones

Kuwait has reported that one person died after drones struck civilian buildings, including its international airport. This incident occurred amidst new strikes launched by both the US and Iran.

科威特报告称，在无人机袭击平民建筑（包括其国际机场）后，一人死亡。这一事件发生在美伊两国发动新一轮袭击的背景下。

Tags: iran · us · kuwait

item.title: 无人机袭击俄罗斯占领的乌克兰地区巴士，造成七人死亡
item.description:
Seven killed after drone hits bus in Russia-controlled part of Ukraine

Seven people were killed when a drone struck a bus traveling in a Russia-controlled area of Ukraine. The bus was reportedly en route between Moscow and Simferopol in Russian-occupied Crimea.

一架无人机袭击了俄罗斯控制的乌克兰地区一辆巴士，造成七人死亡。据报道，该巴士正从莫斯科开往俄罗斯占领的克里米亚辛菲罗波尔。

Tags: ukraine · russia · drone strike

item.title: 我的姐姐、母亲和我将为我的儿子支付2万美元的首付。我需要向IRS申报吗？
item.description:
My sister, mother and I are giving my son $20,000 toward a down payment. Do we report it to the IRS?

The article addresses a financial question about whether a $20,000 gift from family members towards a down payment needs to be reported to the IRS. The implication is that it may fall under gift tax regulations.

文章探讨了一个财务问题，即家人支付的2万美元首付款是否需要向IRS申报。暗示这可能属于赠与税法规的范畴。

Tags: gift tax · irs · real estate

item.title: [酷工作] [上海/现场办公]招一名移动端开发工程师(RN/Flutter) 年包 15W-20W
item.description:
[酷工作] [上海/现场办公]招一名移动端开发工程师(RN/Flutter) 年包 15W-20W

A company in Shanghai is hiring a mobile developer with 3-5 years of experience, including at least 2 years in React Native (RN) or Flutter. The role involves app development, optimization, and architectural design, with a salary range of 150,000-200,000 RMB annually.

上海一家公司正在招聘一名具有3-5年经验（至少2年RN/Flutter经验）的移动端开发工程师。该职位涉及App开发、优化和架构设计，年薪范围为15万-20万人民币。

Tags: mobile developer · react native · flutter

item.title: 资深策略师称，投资者现在对股票持悲观看法是疯狂的。六个月后，也许不是。
item.description:
Investors would be crazy to turn bearish on stocks now, says veteran strategist. In six months, maybe not.

A veteran strategist advises that being bearish on stocks now is irrational, but expresses concern about the market's outlook in six to 12 months. Large tech IPOs are a significant factor in this concern.

一位资深策略师建议，现在对股票持悲观看法是不理性的，但对未来六到十二个月的市场前景表示担忧。大型科技IPO是这种担忧的一个重要因素。

Tags: stock market · strategy · ipo

item.title: 每一字节都至关重要
item.description:
Every Byte Matters

This article, titled 'Every Byte Matters,' likely discusses the importance of data efficiency and optimization in computing or software development. It could cover topics like data compression, storage, or network transmission.

这篇文章题为“每一字节都至关重要”，很可能讨论了在计算或软件开发中数据效率和优化的重要性。它可能涵盖数据压缩、存储或网络传输等主题。

Tags: data efficiency · computing · optimization

item.title: 跨性别青少年有话要说
item.description:
Trans teens have something to say

This article shares the experiences of transgender teens, focusing on one individual's journey with hormonal treatment and the development of PMOS. It highlights the personal impact of these experiences.

这篇文章分享了跨性别青少年的经历，重点讲述了一位个体在激素治疗和PMOS发展过程中的经历。它强调了这些经历的个人影响。

Tags: transgender · teenagers · health

item.title: 世界上最热门的股市今年已翻一番。现在高盛预计将在此基础上再上涨40%。
item.description:
The hottest stock market in the world has doubled this year. Now Goldman Sachs sees another 40% gain from here.

The stock markets of Korea and Taiwan, described as the world's hottest, have doubled this year, and Goldman Sachs anticipates an additional 40% gain. Earnings are identified as the primary driver, with the chip cycle's longevity underestimated.

被誉为世界上最热门的韩国和台湾股市今年已翻一番，高盛预计在此基础上还将上涨40%。盈利被认为是主要驱动因素，而芯片周期的持久性被低估了。

Tags: stock market · goldman sachs · taiwan

item.title: 仅通过扬声器即可入侵您的PC，无需接触
item.description:
Hacking your PC using your speaker without ever touching it

This article explores a method for hacking a PC using its speaker without any physical interaction. It likely details the technical exploit and its potential implications.

这篇文章探讨了一种通过PC的扬声器进行黑客攻击的方法，无需任何物理接触。它可能详细介绍了技术漏洞及其潜在影响。

Tags: hacking · cybersecurity · speakers

item.title: 数学家们发出警告，人工智能正在迅速取得进展
item.description:
Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground

Mathematicians are issuing a warning as artificial intelligence continues its rapid advancement. The article likely discusses the implications of AI's progress on mathematics and research.

随着人工智能的快速发展，数学家们正在发出警告。文章很可能讨论了人工智能的进步对数学和研究的影响。

Tags: ai · mathematics · warning

item.title: 人工智能存在用水问题。谷歌认为它找到了解决方案
item.description:
AI has a water problem. Google thinks it has a fix

Google is addressing concerns about water consumption by AI data centers, proposing solutions to minimize environmental impact. The company has outlined five commitments regarding water use, aiming to replenish more water for local communities.

谷歌正在解决AI数据中心用水量的问题，并提出了最小化环境影响的解决方案。该公司已制定了五项关于用水的承诺，旨在为当地社区补充更多水源。

Tags: ai · sustainability · google

item.title: 小车车里的大世界：车模收藏入坑指南
item.description:
小车车里的大世界：车模收藏入坑指南

This guide is for new enthusiasts looking to start collecting model cars, covering aspects like scale ratios (1:18, 1:43, 1:64), brand selection, purchase channels, and creative ways to enjoy the hobby. It emphasizes model cars as more than toys, but as desktop art.

本指南面向希望开始收藏车模的新爱好者，涵盖了比例（1:18、1:43、1:64）、品牌选择、购买渠道和创意玩法等各个方面。它强调车模不仅仅是玩具，更是桌面艺术品。

Tags: model cars · collecting · guide

item.title: 英国裁定：谷歌必须允许出版商选择退出AI搜索功能
item.description:
Google must let publishers opt out of AI Search features, rules UK

The UK's Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) has ruled that Google must allow online publishers to opt out of its AI Search features. This grants publishers more control over whether their content appears in AI Overviews and is used for training.

英国竞争与市场管理局（CMA）裁定，谷歌必须允许在线出版商选择退出其AI搜索功能。这使得出版商能够更好地控制其内容是否出现在AI概览中以及是否被用于训练。

Tags: google · ai search · uk regulation

item.title: 36氪独家 | 火山引擎提升MaaS营收目标至全年150亿元，Seedance 2.0单月营收已超10亿元
item.description:
36氪独家 | 火山引擎提升MaaS营收目标至全年150亿元，Seedance 2.0单月营收已超10亿元

ByteDance's Volcano Engine has raised its MaaS (Model as a Service) revenue target to 15 billion yuan for the year, with its Seedance 2.0 video model alone generating over 1 billion yuan in monthly revenue. This signifies a significant growth trajectory for their AI offerings.

字节跳动的火山引擎已将其MaaS（模型即服务）年度营收目标提高至150亿元，仅其Seedance 2.0视频模型每月收入就超过10亿元。这标志着其AI产品迎来显著增长。

Tags: volcano engine · maas · ai revenue

item.title: 深圳具身公司星尘智能完成超10亿B轮融资，估值破百亿｜硬氪首发
item.description:
Shell pumped oil through Nigeria pipeline for years despite pollution evidence, documents show

Shenzhen-based embodied AI company Astribot (Xingchen Intelligence) has secured over 1 billion yuan in Series B funding, valuing the company at over 10 billion yuan. This funding will support their development of AI robots designed to 'think like humans and work like humans.'

深圳的具身智能公司星尘智能（Astribot）已完成超过10亿元人民币的B轮融资，公司估值突破百亿元。这笔融资将支持他们开发旨在“像人一样思考，像人一样工作”的AI机器人。

Tags: embodied ai · robotics · funding

item.title: 36氪首发 | 浙大教授团队获财通、商汤投资，做高危场景具身机器人大脑
item.description:
App+1 | 零基础 3 分钟在线搞定产品演示视频：Mockup Studio

A team led by a Zhejiang University professor has secured tens of millions of yuan in pre-A round funding from Cauton Capital and SenseTime to develop AI brains for robots operating in high-risk environments. Their focus is on providing robots with 'engineer brains' for identification, diagnosis, and disposal.

由浙江大学教授领导的团队已获得财通资本和商汤国香数千万元人民币Pre-A轮融资，用于开发在高危环境中运行的机器人的AI大脑。他们的重点是为机器人提供用于识别、诊断和处置的“工程师大脑”。

Tags: embodied ai · robotics · funding

item.title: Ötzi的冰冻遗骸可能携带新陈代谢活跃的微生物
item.description:
深圳具身公司星尘智能完成超10亿B轮融资，估值破百亿｜硬氪首发

Researchers have identified metabolically active microbes in Ötzi, the 5,300-year-old mummy. The findings include bacteria from his gut when alive and cold-tolerant fungi that colonized his body post-mortem.

研究人员在5300年前的冰冻木乃伊Ötzi身上发现了新陈代谢活跃的微生物。研究结果包括他生前肠道中的细菌以及死后在其身体上定植的耐寒真菌。

Tags: archaeology · microbes · science

item.title: 普京在乌克兰问题上仍不妥协，但俄罗斯国内对战争的公众讨论是否在改变？
item.description:
8点1氪丨腾讯股价暴涨，创2021年后单日最高涨幅；预计今年安排约1100亿育儿补贴；英伟达与微软合作推出统一技术栈

Despite Russia intensifying its attacks in Ukraine, the prolonged war is causing concern even among Putin loyalists. The article questions whether public discourse on the war is shifting within Russia.

尽管俄罗斯正在加剧在乌克兰的袭击，但旷日持久的战争甚至引起了普京忠诚支持者的担忧。文章质疑俄罗斯国内对战争的公众讨论是否正在发生变化。

Tags: russia · ukraine · war

item.title: 以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部，但与真主党的部分停火似乎仍在维持
item.description:
God of War Laufey is coming to the PS5

Israel has continued its military operations in southern Lebanon, though a partial truce with Hezbollah appears to be holding. The strikes have not extended to Beirut following a US-brokered deal.

以色列继续其在黎巴嫩南部的军事行动，尽管与真主党的部分停火似乎仍在维持。在美国斡旋的协议后，袭击并未蔓延到贝鲁特。

Tags: israel · lebanon · hezbollah

item.title: 为什么你需要未雨绸缪你的中年大脑，以及如何开始
item.description:
Israel strikes southern Lebanon but partial truce with Hezbollah appears to hold

The period between ages 40 and 65 is a critical time for brain health that has been largely overlooked. Proactive measures taken during this phase can significantly protect cognitive function for decades to come.

40至65岁是大脑健康的关键时期，但这一时期却被严重忽视。在此阶段采取的积极措施可以在未来几十年内显著保护认知功能。

Tags: brain health · aging · cognition

item.title: 电磁频谱如何开启我们对宇宙的视野
item.description:
Show HN: Edsger – A handwritten Clojure REPL for the reMarkable 2

This article explores how our understanding of the electromagnetic spectrum, dating back to Isaac Newton, continues to be crucial for astronomical discovery. It highlights how invisible waves reveal insights about the cosmos and the potential for detecting extraterrestrial life.

这篇文章探讨了我们对可追溯到艾萨克·牛顿的电磁频谱的理解，如何持续对天文学发现至关重要。它强调了不可见波如何揭示宇宙的奥秘，以及探测外星生命的可能性。

Tags: astronomy · electromagnetic spectrum · universe

item.title: 应用光电子：尽管有业绩指引风险，但前景看好
item.description:
Applied Optoelectronics: Despite A Risk On Guidance, It's Bullish From Here

Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) is showing bullish signs despite potential risks in its future guidance. The company's recent performance and market position suggest a positive outlook for investors.

尽管面临业绩指引风险，应用光电子（AAOI）仍展现出看涨的迹象。该公司的近期表现和市场地位预示着对投资者而言前景乐观。

Tags: applied optoelectronics · stock analysis · guidance

item.title: TMV：没人谈论的标普500指数的崩盘对冲，直到现在
item.description:
TMV: The S&P 500 Crash Hedge No One's Talking About, Until Now

The TMV ETF is presented as an underdiscussed hedge against S&P 500 crashes. It offers a way to protect portfolios during market downturns, a strategy gaining attention.

TMV ETF 被提出作为一种鲜为人知的标普500指数崩盘对冲工具。它为投资组合在市场低迷时期提供保护，这一策略正日益受到关注。

Tags: etf · sp500 · hedging · market crash

item.title: 市场持续引诱日元干预，而中国人民银行暗示人民币渐进升值
item.description:
Market Continues To Tempt Japanese Intervention, While PBOC Signals Gradual Yuan Appreciation

The market is persistently testing Japanese intervention levels, while China's central bank signals a gradual appreciation of the Yuan. These moves indicate potential currency market shifts and government strategies.

市场持续测试日元干预的临界点，而中国央行则暗示人民币将逐步升值。这些举措预示着潜在的货币市场变动和政府策略。

Tags: currency · forex · japan · china · yuan · yen

item.title: Barry Callebaut AG (BRRLY) 在第23届dbAccess全球消费品大会上发表演讲
item.description:
Barry Callebaut AG (BRRLY) Presents at 23rd annual dbAccess Global Consumer Conference Transcript

Barry Callebaut AG (BRRLY) participated in the 23rd annual dbAccess Global Consumer Conference. The presentation likely covered the company's performance, strategy, and outlook within the consumer goods sector.

Barry Callebaut AG (BRRLY) 参加了第23届dbAccess全球消费品大会。此次演讲可能涵盖了该公司在消费品行业的表现、战略和前景。

Tags: consumer goods · earnings · conference · barry callebaut

item.title: 我75岁了，我和我丈夫有150万美元的股票和42.5万美元的储蓄，这是否现金太多了？
item.description:
My husband and I are 75. We have $1.5 million in stocks and $425,000 in savings. Is that too much cash?

A 75-year-old couple with $1.5 million in stocks and $425,000 in savings is seeking advice on whether their cash holdings are excessive. They are debt-free and the husband will receive 80% of his salary in retirement.

一对75岁的夫妇拥有150万美元的股票和42.5万美元的储蓄，正在咨询其现金持有量是否过多的建议。他们无债务，并且丈夫退休后将获得80%的工资。

Tags: retirement planning · personal finance · investment · savings

item.title: [职场话题] 卷不动了，回到很小很小的县城
item.description:
[职场话题] 卷不动了，回到很小很小的县城

Feeling burnt out from intense career competition, an individual is moving to a small county town for work. Despite lower salaries and not-insignificant living costs, they express a sense of resignation about their life path.

一位职场人士因激烈的竞争感到疲惫，决定回到小县城工作。尽管工资不高且生活成本不低，他表达了对人生道路的无奈。

Tags: career · burnout · small town · work-life balance

item.title: Invesco 在第一季度业绩公布后延续了看涨趋势，客户资金流入增长
item.description:
Invesco Continues Bullish Trend After Q1 Results, As Client Inflows Grew

Invesco has maintained a bullish trend following its Q1 results, driven by increased client inflows. This positive momentum suggests investor confidence in the asset management firm.

在第一季度业绩公布后，Invesco 凭借客户资金流入的增长，延续了看涨趋势。这种积极势头表明了投资者对这家资产管理公司的信心。

Tags: invesco · asset management · earnings · client inflows

item.title: “这是一条非常微妙的界限”：我是一名CFP，但认为在高尔夫球场上建立人脉关系没有问题，我错了吗？
item.description:
‘It is such a fine line’: I am a CFP and see nothing wrong with networking on the golf course. Am I wrong?

A Certified Financial Planner (CFP) believes networking on the golf course is acceptable and seeks validation. They express a desire to build professional relationships with fellow golfers.

一位注册理财规划师（CFP）认为在高尔夫球场上建立人脉关系是可接受的，并寻求认同。他表示希望与球友建立职业关系。

Tags: financial planning · networking · career · ethics

item.title: [问与答] 为什么很多人要给电子产品带套
item.description:
[问与答] 为什么很多人要给电子产品带套

The discussion revolves around why people frequently use protective cases for electronic devices. While cases for phones are understandable for protection, users are questioning the need for covers on chargers and cables.

讨论围绕人们为何频繁为电子产品使用保护套展开。虽然手机壳可以理解其保护作用，但用户对充电器和数据线使用保护套的必要性表示疑问。

Tags: electronics · accessories · consumer behavior · protection

item.title: [OpenAI] 一个手机号可以绑定几个 ChatGPT 账号?
item.description:
[OpenAI] 一个手机号可以绑定几个 ChatGPT 账号?

This post asks about the possibility of binding multiple ChatGPT accounts to a single phone number. It's a query regarding account management and usage limits on the OpenAI platform.

此帖询问一个手机号绑定多个ChatGPT账号的可能性。这是关于OpenAI平台上的账户管理和使用限制的疑问。

Tags: openai · chatgpt · account limits · usage policy

item.title: 下载：AI 现在可以管理你的行政部门
item.description:
The Download: AI can run your admin department now

The Download newsletter highlights how AI is capable of handling administrative tasks for businesses. This suggests AI's growing role in streamlining operations across various business functions.

The Download 简报强调了人工智能如何能够处理企业的行政任务。这表明人工智能在简化各种业务职能方面扮演着日益重要的角色。

Tags: ai · business administration · automation · small business

item.title: [程序员] AI 快速发展， 40 岁大龄程序员何去何从
item.description:
[程序员] AI 快速发展， 40 岁大龄程序员何去何从

A 40-year-old programmer expresses concern about their future career prospects amid the rapid advancement of AI. They feel that being a code writer at this age marks a "failed life."

一位40岁的程序员对人工智能的快速发展带来的职业前景表示担忧。他认为在这个年龄还在写代码标志着“失败的人生”。

Tags: programming · ai · career · ageism · tech industry

item.title: 俄方打击造成18人死亡，乌克兰救援人员从废墟中拉出遇难者遗体
item.description:
Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble after Russian strikes kill 18 people

Russian strikes have resulted in the deaths of 18 people, with Ukrainian rescuers recovering bodies from the rubble. Among the deceased are an eight-year-old boy and a woman killed in an apartment block attack.

俄罗斯的袭击已造成18人死亡，乌克兰救援人员从废墟中找到了遇难者遗体。遇难者中包括一名8岁男孩和一名在公寓楼袭击中丧生的妇女。

Tags: ukraine · russia · conflict · civilian casualties

item.title: Apple 因使用辅助功能API而拒绝了我的语音识别应用程序
item.description:
Apple rejected my dictation app for using the accessibility API

Apple rejected a dictation app for utilizing the accessibility API, indicating a potential conflict with Apple's developer guidelines. The developer is seeking feedback or solutions regarding this rejection.

苹果公司因使用辅助功能API而拒绝了一款语音识别应用程序。这表明可能与苹果的开发者指南存在冲突，开发者正在寻求关于此次拒绝的反馈或解决方案。

Tags: apple · app rejection · accessibility api · developer issues

item.title: 人们在无人驾驶出租车里留下了很多奇怪的东西
item.description:
People are leaving a lot of weird stuff in their robotaxis

Uber's annual Lost and Found Index reveals a peculiar collection of items left behind in robotaxis, ranging from collectible toys to personal items like dentures. This highlights user behavior in autonomous vehicle services.

优步的年度失物招领指数揭示了在无人驾驶出租车中被遗弃的各种奇怪物品，从收藏玩具到假牙等个人物品。这突显了用户在自动驾驶车辆服务中的行为。

Tags: robotaxi · autonomous vehicles · user behavior · uber

item.title: 现在获得录用的一个方法：愿意每周五天去办公室上班
item.description:
One way to get hired right now: Be willing to go to the office five days a week

New research suggests that being willing to work in the office five days a week can be a key factor in securing employment. This approach appears to be particularly beneficial for young workers.

一项新研究表明，愿意每周五天去办公室上班可能是获得就业的关键因素。这种方法对年轻工人尤其有利。

Tags: remote work · office work · job market · career advice · young workers

item.title: 在特朗普试图向交易员保证和平协议即将到来后，油价下跌
item.description:
Oil prices drop after Trump tries to reassure traders that peace deal is coming

Oil prices declined after former President Trump made statements aiming to reassure traders about an impending peace deal. This indicates the market's sensitivity to geopolitical pronouncements.

在特朗普试图向交易员保证和平协议即将到来后，油价下跌。这表明市场对地缘政治声明的敏感性。

Tags: oil prices · geopolitics · market reaction · peace deal

item.title: 氪星晚报｜私募股权公司Ardian将与Verne合作，斥资50亿欧元在法国建数字基础设施园区；快手：平台累计催生189个新职业，其中由AI发展带来的新职业达15个；中央财政下达育儿补贴补助资金999亿元支持实施育儿补贴制度
item.description:
氪星晚报｜私募股权公司Ardian将与Verne合作，斥资50亿欧元在法国建数字基础设施园区；快手：平台累计催生189个新职业，其中由AI发展带来的新职业达15个；中央财政下达育儿补贴补助资金999亿元支持实施育儿补贴制度

Ardian and Verne will invest €5 billion in a digital infrastructure park in France, while Kuaishou reports 15 AI-driven new professions among 189 total. Additionally, China's central finance has allocated 99.9 billion yuan for childcare subsidies.

私募股权公司Ardian将与Verne合作，斥资50亿欧元在法国建设数字基础设施园区；快手报告称平台已催生189个新职业，其中15个由AI驱动。此外，中国中央财政已拨款999亿元用于育儿补贴。

Tags: digital infrastructure · ai · new professions · childcare subsidies · investment

item.title: 为何说最重要的赋能AI的公司不是英伟达，据一位基金经理说
item.description:
Why the most important company enabling AI isn’t Nvidia, according to this fund manager

A fund manager argues that Nvidia is not the most critical enabler of AI, suggesting other companies are more pivotal to the AI landscape's success. This challenges the common perception of Nvidia's dominance.

一位基金经理认为，最重要的赋能AI的公司并非英伟达，而是其他公司对AI领域的成功更为关键。这挑战了人们对英伟达主导地位的普遍看法。

Tags: ai · nvidia · fund manager · investment strategy

item.title: [问与答] 各位怎么看待懒猫微服对于开源项目云微信“抄袭”事件的做法呢
item.description:
[问与答] 各位怎么看待懒猫微服对于开源项目云微信“抄袭”事件的做法呢

This post seeks opinions on the 'Lazy Cat Microservices' handling of an alleged 'copying' incident involving the open-source project 'Cloud WeChat.' The discussion likely involves open-source ethics and intellectual property.

此帖旨在征求大家对“懒猫微服务”处理开源项目“云微信”涉嫌“抄袭”事件的看法。讨论可能涉及开源道德和知识产权。

Tags: open source · intellectual property · wechat · copyright · developer ethics

item.title: Instagram AI 聊天机器人被黑客欺骗，从而获得访问他人账户的权限
item.description:
Instagram AI chatbot tricked by hackers to give access to others' accounts

An AI chatbot on Instagram was reportedly tricked by hackers, granting them unauthorized access to other users' accounts. This incident raises concerns about the security of AI-powered features.

据报道，Instagram上的一个AI聊天机器人被黑客欺骗，使他们能够未经授权访问其他用户的账户。此次事件引发了对AI驱动功能安全性的担忧。

Tags: instagram · ai chatbot · hacking · security breach · account access

item.title: 利用AI实现全球医疗保健的“再人性化”
item.description:
Rehumanizing global health care with agentic AI

The article discusses how AI can be used to 'rehumanize' global healthcare, addressing issues like underinvestment, staff burnout, and fragmented access to care. AI could help bridge gaps and improve patient and provider experiences.

文章探讨了如何利用AI“再人性化”全球医疗保健，解决投资不足、员工倦怠和护理服务碎片化等问题。AI可以帮助弥合差距并改善患者和提供者的体验。

Tags: ai · healthcare · global health · humanization · patient care

item.title: 肯尼亚抗议者反对美国埃博拉隔离中心计划，造成两人死亡
item.description:
Two people shot dead amid Kenya protests against US Ebola quarantine centre plan

Two people were killed amidst protests in Kenya against a proposed US-backed Ebola quarantine center. The plan has ignited public anger, leading to demonstrations near the intended facility site.

肯尼亚爆发抗议活动，反对美国资助的埃博拉隔离中心计划，导致两人死亡。该计划激起了公众的愤怒，并在拟建设施附近引发了示威活动。

Tags: kenya · protests · ebola · public health · us foreign policy

item.title: 豆包6月下旬正式付费，并加速打通抖音电商丨36氪独家
item.description:
豆包6月下旬正式付费，并加速打通抖音电商丨36氪独家

Doubao is set to launch its paid subscription services in late June, with pricing tiers ranging from free to 500 yuan/month. The platform will also integrate with Douyin e-commerce, aiming for commercialization and traffic diversion.

豆包将于6月下旬正式推出付费订阅服务，价格从免费到每月500元不等。该平台还将与抖音电商整合，旨在实现商业化和引流。

Tags: doubao · paid subscription · ai · douyin · e-commerce

item.title: 小企业如何利用AI
item.description:
How small businesses can leverage AI

This article from MIT Technology Review's 'Making AI Work' newsletter provides guidance for small businesses on leveraging AI across various functions. It covers areas like accounting, design, market research, and product development.

本文来自MIT科技评论的“让AI工作”邮件通讯，为小企业提供了在各个职能领域利用AI的指导。内容涵盖会计、设计、市场研究和产品开发等领域。

Tags: ai · small business · leveraging ai · business strategy · mit tech review

item.title: 尽管以色列和真主党接受了美国的局部停火计划，黎巴嫩的冲突仍在继续
item.description:
Clashes continue in Lebanon despite Israel and Hezbollah accepting US partial ceasefire plan

Clashes persist in Lebanon despite both Israel and Hezbollah accepting a US-proposed partial ceasefire plan. This indicates ongoing complexities in achieving a lasting cessation of hostilities in the region.

尽管以色列和真主党接受了美国提出的局部停火计划，黎巴嫩的冲突仍在继续。这表明实现该地区持久停火仍面临持续的复杂性。

Tags: lebanon · israel · hezbollah · ceasefire · conflict

item.title: 从插件到 AI 辅助：Obsidian 如何成为我的主力工具
item.description:
从插件到 AI 辅助：Obsidian 如何成为我的主力工具

The author shares how Obsidian has become their primary tool for knowledge management, transitioning from a plugin-based system to one enhanced by AI assistance. They emphasize its effectiveness for knowledge workers.

作者分享了Obsidian如何从一个基于插件的系统转变为一个由AI辅助的系统，并成为其知识管理的主力工具。他强调了其对知识工作者的有效性。

Tags: obsidian · knowledge management · ai assistant · productivity tool · note-taking

item.title: 丹麦的梅特·弗雷德里克森在数月谈判后组建政府
item.description:
Denmark's Mette Frederiksen to form government after months of negotiations

Mette Frederiksen, leader of Denmark's Social Democratic Party, is forming a center-left coalition minority government, securing her a third term as prime minister. This follows months of political negotiations.

丹麦社会民主党领导人梅特·弗雷德里克森正在组建一个中左翼联合少数政府，这将是她第三次担任首相。这发生在数月的政治谈判之后。

Tags: denmark · government formation · politics · mette frederiksen · coalition
